moves.desc: this move has a 10% chance to raise all the user's stats by one stage.

moves.name: sizzly slide
moves.desc: this move has a 30% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: skull bash
moves.desc: the user raises defense on the first turn and attacks on the second turn.

moves.name: sky attack
moves.desc: this move takes one turn to charge and has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: sky uppercut
moves.desc: this move has no additional effect.

moves.name: slack off
moves.desc: this move restores 50% of the user's max HP.

moves.name: slam
moves.desc: this move has no additional effect.

moves.name: slash
moves.desc: this move has a high critical hit ratio.

moves.name: sleep powder
moves.desc: this move puts the target to sleep.

moves.name: sludge
moves.desc: this move has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: sludge bomb
moves.desc: this move has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: smack down
moves.desc: this move turns Flying-type Pokémon into Ground type temporarily.

moves.name: smokescreen
moves.desc: this move lowers the target's accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: snarl
moves.desc: this move lowers the target's special attack by one stage.

moves.name: snatch

moves.name: snore

moves.name: soft-boiled
moves.desc: this move restores 50% of the user's max HP.

moves.name: solar beam
moves.desc: this move charges on the first turn and attacks on the second turn.

moves.desc: this move always inflicts 20 HP damage.

moves.name: spacial rend
moves.desc: this move has a high critical hit ratio.

moves.name: spark
moves.desc: this move has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: spike cannon
moves.desc: this move hits 2–5 times in a row.

moves.name: spikes
moves.desc: this move sets up spikes that damage non-Flying, non-Steel opponents entering the battlefield.

moves.name: spirit shackle
moves.desc: this move prevents the target from escaping or switching out.

moves.name: spit up
moves.desc: this move deals damage equal to the amount of stockpiled 'stockpile' points.

moves.name: spite
moves.desc: this move reduces the PP of the target's last used move by 4.

moves.name: splinter
moves.desc: this move has a 30% chance to lower the target's defense.

moves.name: stealth rock
moves.desc: this move lays a trap of floating stones that damages any Pokémon switching in based on their weakness to Rock.

moves.name: steam eruption
moves.desc: this move has a 30% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: steel wing
moves.desc: this move has a 10% chance to raise the user's defense by one stage.

moves.name: sticky web
moves.desc: this move lowers the speed of all opposing Pokémon that switch in.

moves.name: storm throw
moves.desc: this move always results in a critical hit.

moves.name: steamroller
moves.desc: this move has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: strength
moves.desc: this move has no additional effect.

moves.name: struggle
moves.desc: this move is used when the user has no PP left for any other move and causes recoil damage.

moves.name: stun spore
moves.desc: this move paralyzes the target.

moves.name: submission
moves.desc: this move deals recoil damage equal to 25% of the damage inflicted.

moves.name: substitute
moves.desc: this move sacrifices 25% of the user's max HP to create a substitute that takes damage in place of the user.

moves.name: sucker punch
moves.desc: this move only works if the target is about to use a damaging move.

moves.name: sunny day
moves.desc: this move boosts fire-type moves and weakens water-type moves for five turns.

moves.name: super fang
moves.desc: this move halves the target's current HP.

moves.name: superpower
moves.desc: this move lowers the user's attack and defense by one stage after use.

moves.name: supersonic
moves.desc: this move confuses the target.

moves.name: surf
moves.desc: this move hits all adjacent Pokémon in battle.

moves.name: swallow
moves.desc: this move restores HP equal to the amount of 'stockpile' points used by 'spit up'.

moves.name: sweet scent
moves.desc: this move lowers the target's evasion by one stage and lures them into battle in wild encounters.

moves.name: swift
moves.desc: this move never misses.

moves.name: swords dance
moves.desc: this move sharply raises the user's attack by two stages.

moves.name: synchronoise
moves.desc: this move only affects Pokémon that share a type with the user.

moves.name: tackle
moves.desc: this move has no additional effect.

moves.name: take down
moves.desc: this move deals recoil damage equal to 25% of the damage inflicted.

moves.desc: this move lowers the target's attack and special attack by one stage each.

moves.name: tectonic rage
moves.desc: this move hits both opposing Pokémon in double battles.

moves.name: thief

moves.name: thousand arrows
moves.desc: this move hits Flying-type Pokémon and removes their immunity to Ground moves.

moves.name: thousand waves
moves.desc: this move prevents the target from escaping for the turn.

moves.desc: this move has a 30% chance to paralyze the target and accuracy is perfect in rain.

moves.desc: this move has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.desc: this move has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.desc: this move paralyzes the target.

moves.desc: this move has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.desc: this move reverses all of the target's stat changes.

moves.name: toxic
moves.desc: this move badly poisons the target, increasing damage each turn.

moves.name: trailblaze
moves.desc: this move has a 20% chance to burn the target.

moves.desc: this move copies the target's appearance, types, and moves.

moves.desc: this move hits three times consecutively, with each hit increasing in power.

moves.desc: this move hits three times consecutively, with each hit increasing in power.

moves.desc: this move hits twice.

moves.desc: this move has no secondary effect.

moves.desc: this move has no secondary effect.

moves.desc: this move has no secondary effect.

moves.name: waterfall
moves.desc: this move has no secondary effect.

moves.name: weather ball

moves.name: whirlpool
moves.desc: the target is bound for 2-5 turns.

moves.desc: this move typically goes last. the target is forced to switch out. this ends a wild battle.

moves.desc: this move burns the target.

moves.name: wing attack
moves.desc: this move has no secondary effect.
